description_long: This object is a stylized trumpet with a golden brass-like body and three prominent piston valves positioned along the top. The bell is octagonal and flares outward with a distinct, geometric shape, while the tubing forms a continuous loop with angular bends. The mouthpiece is square and silver, contrasting with the rest of the instrument. The valve casings and tuning slides are rendered in a lighter metallic color, adding visual distinction to the functional parts. The overall design is blocky and geometric, giving the trumpet a modern, almost voxel-like appearance.
description: A golden, geometric trumpet with three silver piston valves, an octagonal flared bell, and a square silver mouthpiece.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the trumpet, highlighting the three piston valves and the angular tubing.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the alignment of the valves and the octagonal bell shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the continuous tubing loop and the distinct bell flare.
description_view_3: Front view focused on the octagonal bell opening and the square mouthpiece at the rear.
attribute_bell_flare: Octagonal and wide, with a gradual but geometric flare.
attribute_valve_configuration: Three piston valves arranged in a straight line along the top center of the trumpet.
attribute_leadpipe_curvature: Gently curved with angular bends leading from the mouthpiece to the main tuning slide.
attribute_tuning_slide_location: U-shaped tuning slide located just after the leadpipe and before the valve section, oriented downward.
